计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，但该校相关专业非顶尖；湖南省物理类考生2021年20.6 万→2025年32.0万→2026年34.7万，持续大幅增长，2026年较2025年增加约8.4%，竞争加剧。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 27685 → 42606 → 42191 → 46585 → 58342, showing a continuous backward shift, with a cumulative backward shift of about 30,657 places in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 58,342, a significant backward shift of about 11,757 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear downward trend; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 12 in 2021 → 26 in 2022 → 26 in 2023 → 47 in 2024 → 61 in 2025 → 67 in 2026, with continuous expansion, and 2026 sees an expansion of about 9.8% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 114th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable upward trend in recent years (120th in 2021 → 114th in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle tier; ranked 101st in comprehensive Douyin popularity, rated as "average," with low short video exposure; no significant negative or positive public opinion events involving Inner Mongolia University from 2021 to 2026 were found in reputation documents, no record of enrollment gaps, overall reputation stable; the university is known for specialties such as biology, ecology, and ethnology, but its discipline evaluation grades have not reached A-.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text:
Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication remains high, but the university's related majors are not top-tier; the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 320,000 in 2025 and 347,000 in 2026, a continuous significant increase, with 2026 seeing an increase of about 8.4% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.
7. [Geographical Factor] Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Hunan, so willingness to study across provinces may be low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend in historical rankings, the significant increase in Physics Category examinees in 2026 (+8.4%), the expansion of enrollment plan (+9.8%) but with the expansion rate roughly matching the examinee increase rate, and the stable university reputation and generally low geographical preference, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 58,342; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 61,985, with a range of 61,485–62,485.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 61,485–62,485, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 61,000), focus on sprinting for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Software Engineering; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 62,500), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 safety majors.
